description: Machine-parsable Allowed change scope for the Desenio delta (mirrors Canvas CAN-029). Protected surfaces deliberately EXCLUDED so a change is flagged out-of-scope: src/components/InkWave.tsx (hero, VIS-023), src/lib/bazi.ts (placeholder, VIS-025). NOTE: server/pricing.js is IN scope ONLY for REQ-016 region currency (USD/GBP/EUR) — a confirmed PRD requirement (T-502); the existing shipping math (US/UK free, EU threshold) + the 18 checkout.repricing money-path tests MUST stay green.
